name: Lemon Cake-Top Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and continue creaming.
3. Add egg yolks, beating well after each addition.
4. Incorporate flour, lemon juice, and salt.
5. Stir in milk.
6. Fold in toasted almonds.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the mixture.
8. Pour batter into a baking dish.
9. Place pan in hot water bath and bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
10. Increase temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until brown.
11. Sprinkle remaining toasted almonds on top and serve warm or chilled.
Makes 8 servings. This is a light dessert.
